headline: After 11 years, Northland Capital downgrades AMD
summary: Investing.com -- Northland Capital Markets has downgraded Advanced Micro Devices to Market Perform after more than a decade of bullish coverage, setting a price target of $260 and warning that consensus estimates for 2027 are too optimistic.

content.title: After 11 years, Northland Capital downgrades AMD
content.summary: Investing.com -- Northland Capital Markets has downgraded Advanced Micro Devices to Market Perform after more than a decade of bullish coverage, setting a price target of $260 and warning that consensus estimates for 2027 are too optimistic.

headline: Lightmatter Names Roy Kim Vice President of Product to Lead Global Deployment of Photonic Interconnects
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., April 27, 2026--Lightmatter, the leader in photonic (super)computing, today announced the appointment of Roy Kim as Vice President of Product. Kim brings more than 15 years of AI infrastructure product leadership from Google, AMD, and NVIDIA, and will lead Lightmatter's product strategy as the company scales its Passage™ photonic interconnect platform and Guide™ VLSP light engine from landmark industry firsts to volume deployment across the world's most advanced AI data ce

Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Meta (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Amazon (AMZN), and Apple (AAPL) are all reporting quarterly earnings results this week.
